specs.title: cp-000: Idle-state subtitle is exactly Multi-perspective literature synthesis

cp-015: The start button has no spinner disabled-loading state or label change during pl
cp-016: The plan-loading shell renders only when pageState plan-preview and planPerspect

cp-018: The populated plan preview renders only when pageState plan-preview and planPers
cp-019: ResearchPlanPreview copies initialPerspectives into component-local state once w

cp-023: The preview subtitle is exactly Review and customize the research perspectives b

cp-027: Query inputs use the exact placeholder Search query
